proposed_iteration3_fixlist.title: Kill the echo loop: lastEmitted guard in RichTextEditor reload effect + RichDocumentView/harness stop feeding onChange back as initialContent (fixes H1: caret teleport, IME break, O(doc)/keystroke parse)
Monaco keystroke isolation: keymap handler ignores events originating inside the code-block host (H3)
Schema fail-closed: ok:false -> read-only editor + Save disabled + typed banner retained (H2)
Save integrity: dirty generation counter across in-flight saves; beforeunload/doc-switch dirty guard; conflict path snapshots local doc before reload and offers re-apply (H5)
Hash correctness: languageRef in MonacoCodeBlockView, all attr writes through makeCodeBlockAttrs (H4/M10); wire verifyCodeBlockIntegrity into document load with typed error (M9)
Wire handleCodeBlockPaste via editorProps.handlePaste + ClipboardEvent test (H6); add codeToProse command (M4)
Real round-trip + typing tests in offline lane: fresh-editor schema re-hydration, mid-document caret typing, Monaco typing + hash, undo sequence, IME smoke (H7/H8/M19)

Keyboard a11y bundle: code-block boundary exit + Escape (M6/M17), palette arrow-nav + valid option semantics (M12/L20), dialog focus trap/restore (M13), toolbar roving tabindex (M16), isComposing guard (L15), Mod-s + save command (L16)
Monaco reconcile: setValue -> pushEditOperations + view-state preserve; decide single undo owner and test cross-boundary undo (M5/M7)
Command correctness: populate canRun + disable in toolbar/palette, NodeSelection-replacement guard (M11), table edit family (L12), undo/redo commands (L14), real overflow menu (L13)
Mention/tag creation path: suggestion popup render + items source or arg-prompt insert commands (M1)
Debug payload gating: debug-flag/debounce for snapshot walks + per-document namespacing (M15/L19); polyfill getClientRects in vitest setup (L25)
Typed backend error codes replacing substring classification; truthful conflict hint (M18)
Code-intelligence bridge (GAP-ED-005): Monaco completion/hover/definition/references/diagnostics/formatting providers over /knowledge/code/* (M8) - promotes the embed toward IntelliSense-class
Link truthfulness + navigation: backend resolution pass for hsLink resolved flag (M3), refKind clamp on paste (L3), click-to-navigate handler (unowned gap)
Perf hardening: 10k-block perf budget test; debounced code-attr writes (L6); lazy Monaco mount (L7); incremental selection offsets (M14)
Workbench shell backlog (iteration 4 candidates): outline panel, status bar, split/tabs, diff view, settings/keybindings/themes UI, draft recovery surface
